name: C-15 --paywalled --require-attestation refuses when no attestation file exists per the architecture
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --framework-id paywall-source --fetch-frequency weekly --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --paywalled --require-attestation 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'attestation' err.txt && echo refused 1>&2
